## Description

## Type of Change
- [ ] New principle
- [ ] Improvement to existing principle  
- [ ] New example
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update

## Evidence
How is this principle backed? (production experience, analysis, empirical testing)

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows existing document format and style
- [ ] Includes good/bad example pairs (for new principles)
- [ ] Does not contradict existing principles
- [ ] Culturally neutral or explicitly scoped
